title: Provenance + citation-coverage enforcement ("no source, no claim") + staleness fail-safe (lastVerified/validUntil)
context: Benefits-Navigator is an openly-licensed corpus of plain-language, primary-source-cited, multilingual, accessible guides to public-assistance programs (SNAP, Medicaid/CHIP, WIC, TANF, LIHEAP, SSI, housing, EITC, Lifeline/ACP), delivered as a static site, printable PDFs, and structured data with an optional retrieval-grounded explainer. It is a HIGH risk-tier project: it provides information, not legal/benefits advice, never makes an individualized eligibility determination, and always routes people to the official application and free human help. No partner, credentialed reviewer, or requestor is yet secured. This task implements citation-coverage enforcement (no source, no claim) and the staleness fail-safe so no guide claim renders without an attached source and figures past their validUntil window are auto-flagged or withheld until re-verified and re-signed-off.
objective: Implement citation-coverage enforcement and the lastVerified/validUntil staleness fail-safe so uncited claims cannot render and stale figures are flagged or withheld until re-verified.
acceptanceCriteria: No guide claim renders without an attached Source (citation-coverage test)

Each Source carries lastVerified + validUntil; at render/serve time a claim past validUntil is auto-flagged or withheld (withheld for high-severity numeric figures) until re-verified and re-signed-off
A staleness test asserts no claim serves as current past its window
